title: Iran and U.S. Consider One-Page Plan to End Hostilities, Iranian Officials Say
summary_full: The plan would reopen the Strait of Hormuz and give the two countries 30 days to hammer out a comprehensive deal, according to three Iranian officials.
summary_public: The plan would reopen the Strait of Hormuz and give the two countries 30 days to hammer out a comprehensive deal, according to three Iranian officials.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iran and U.S. Consider One-Page Plan to End Hostilities
